page_title: "Palantir Foundry Enrollment"
subcategory: ""
description: |-
  Manages a Foundry Enrollment.

  The following operations are currently supported:

    - Import an enrollment
    - Add or remove an organization's roles

    Note: support for Enrollments is currently limited to just adding and removing roles.

---
# Foundry Enrollment

```terraform
resource "foundry_enrollment" "example-enrollment" {
  planned_organization_roles = [
    {
      "role_id" : "enrollment:example-role",
      "principal_id" : "example-user-id",
    },
    {
      "role_id" : "enrollment:example-role",
      "principal_id" : "example-group-id",
    },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `planned_enrollment_roles` (Set of Object) Planned list of roles assigned to principals for this enrollment (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--planned_enrollment_roles))

### Read-Only

- `enrollment_roles` (Set of Object) Actual list of roles assigned to principals for this enrollment, computed after successful addition/removal of roles (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--enrollment_roles))
- `rid` (String) Identifier of the Enrollment.

<a id="nestedatt--planned_enrollment_roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `planned_enrollment_roles`

Required:

- `principal_id` (String)
- `role_id` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--enrollment_roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `enrollment_roles`

Read-Only:

- `principal_id` (String)
- `role_id` (String)
